operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV status data is received from Geek and used by the Sorter Sweeper Database
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that data from Geek on the AGVs is sent to the receiving system and used within the AGV Status Model under the Sorter Sweeper Database context.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / AGV Status Model'
Visible text: 'Data from Geek on the AGVs are sent to us.'

relationships.description: AGV-related data is sent from Geek to the receiving system described on the slide.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database AGV Status Model receives AGV data from Geek. The slide indicates AGV information is sent to the system for downstream operational use.

operational_knowledge_units.title: RMS fault on an AGV triggers tipper notification behavior
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The AGV status information is used to notify tippers when an RMS fault condition exists.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'We use the information to notify tippers if there is an RMS Fault'

relationships.description: AGV fault information is used to notify the tipper.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGV Status Model behavior: if there is an RMS Fault on an AGV, the system uses received AGV data to notify tippers.

operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV waiting-for-tote condition triggers hospital notification
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The AGV status information is used to notify the hospital when an AGV is waiting for a tote.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'notify the hospital if an AGV is waiting for a tote'

relationships.description: Hospital is notified when an AGV is waiting for a tote.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGV Status Model behavior: when an AGV is waiting for a tote, the system notifies the hospital.

operational_knowledge_units.title: If an AGV is called to maintenance, a tote is sent to the hospital
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes a routing/action rule where a tote is sent to the hospital if the AGV is called to maintenance.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'send a tote to the hospital if the AGV is called to maintenance.'

relationships.description: A tote is sent to the hospital when the AGV is called to maintenance.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Routing rule in AGV Status Model: if an AGV is called to maintenance, send a tote to the hospital.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit reusable procedure on AGV Status Model slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Sorter Sweeper Database / AGV Status Model' describing how AGV data is used for notifications and tote routing under specific conditions.
warnings: The slide describes conditional system behavior but does not provide operator or support action steps.
No explicit step sequence, UI interaction, or validation procedure is shown.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as a procedure candidate because slide 107 provides AGV status model behavior and routing/notification logic, not a reusable action sequence.
